{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_22","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nfrom collections import defaultdict, deque\nimport pandas as pd\nfrom solve_supply_chain import load_orders, load_supplier_receipts, load_wholesaler_receipts, load_store_receipts\n\norders = load_orders()\nsupplier = load_supplier_receipts()\nwh = load_wholesaler_receipts()\nst = load_store_receipts()\n\nsupplier_join = supplier.merge(wh, on=['day','producer_id'], how='inner', validate='many_to_one')\nsupplier_join = supplier_join.sort_values(['day','sequence_no'])\norders = orders.sort_values(['day','store_id','line_no'])\nst = st.sort_values(['day','sequence_no'])\n\n# build dicts\nsupplier_by_day = {day: df for day, df in supplier_join.groupby('day', sort=True)}\norders_by_day_store = {(day, store): df for (day, store), df in orders.groupby(['day','store_id'], sort=True)}\nreceipts_by_day = {day: df for day, df in st.groupby('day', sort=True)}\n\ninventory = defaultdict(int)\nerrors = []\nfor day in range(1, 366):\n    # add supplier stock for this day\n    for row in supplier_by_day.get(day, []).itertuples(index=False):\n        inventory[row.product_id] += row.qty\n    # process store receipts in sequence\n    for rec in receipts_by_day[day].sort_values('sequence_no').itertuples(index=False):\n        total = 0\n        order_df = orders_by_day_store.get((day, rec.store_id))\n        if order_df is not None:\n            for line in order_df.sort_values('line_no').itertuples(index=False):\n                delivered = min(line.qty, inventory[line.product_id])\n                inventory[line.product_id] -= delivered\n                total += delivered\n        if total \"'!= rec.total_delivered_units:\n            errors.append((day, rec.store_id, rec.sequence_no, total, rec.total_delivered_units))\n            if len(errors) >= 20:\n                break\n    if len(errors) >= 20:\n        break\nprint('\"'errors', len(errors))\nfor e in errors[:20]:\n    print(e)\nprint('remaining inventory positive products', sum(v>0 for v in inventory.values()), 'total units', sum(inventory.values()))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_31","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport pandas as pd\nsales=pd.read_csv('/app/sales_log.csv')\nagg=sales.groupby(['Day','Store_ID','Product_ID'],as_index=False)['Reported_Demand'].sum()\n# expected as store mean * day product total / grand total (two-way multiplicative via IPFP approximate)\nres=[]\nfor prod,df in agg.groupby('Product_ID'):\n    pivot=df.pivot(index='Day', columns='Store_ID', values='Reported_Demand').sort_index().sort_index(axis=1)\n    # simple iterative proportional fitting for rank-1 under Poisson\n    arr=pivot.values.astype(float)\n    store_scale=arr.mean(axis=0)\n    day_factor=arr.mean(axis=1)\n    # alternate scaling\n    for _ in range(50):\n        day_factor = arr.sum(axis=1) / store_scale.sum()\n        store_scale = arr.sum(axis=0) / day_factor.sum()\n    expected=day_factor[:,None]*store_scale[None,:]\n    ratio=arr/expected\n    # normalize store ratios to mean 1\n    ratio = ratio / ratio.mean(axis=0, keepdims=True)\n    for i,day in enumerate(pivot.index):\n        for j,store in enumerate(pivot.columns):\n            res.append((prod, day, store, arr[i,j], expected[i,j], ratio[i,j]))\nres=pd.DataFrame(res, columns=['product','day','store','demand','expected','ratio'])\nprint(res.nsmallest(50,'ratio').to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_40","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport numpy as np\nimport pandas as pd\n\nsale_batches=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/sale_batches.pkl')\ndemand=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/demand.pkl')\n\n# aggregate demand\nweights=np.array([0.8]*3 + [0.5]*4 + [0.2]*7)\n\nagg=sale_batches.groupby(['sale_day','store_id','product_id','producer_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum()\ntot=agg.groupby(['sale_day','store_id','product_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum().rename(columns={'qty':'total'})\nmerged=agg.merge(tot,on=['sale_day','store_id','product_id'])\nmerged['share']=merged['qty']/merged['total']\nsole=merged[merged['share']==1.0].copy()\n\nresults=[]\nfor prod, ddf in demand.groupby('product_id'):\n    pivot=ddf.pivot(index='day', columns='store_id', values='reported_demand').reindex(index=range(1,366))\n    logd=np.log(pivot)\n    # two-way demeaned residual in logs\n    resid = logd.sub(logd.mean(axis=1), axis=0).sub(logd.mean(axis=0), axis=1) + logd.values.mean()\n    resid = resid - resid.values.mean()  # center\n    # actually two-way demean: x - rowmean - colmean + grandmean\n    resid = logd - logd.mean(axis=1).to_numpy()[:,None] - logd.mean(axis=0).to_numpy()[None,:] + logd.values.mean()\n    neg = (-resid).clip(lower=0)\n    prod_sole = sole[sole['product_id']==prod]\n    for row in prod_sole.itertuples(index=False):\n        day=row.sale_day\n        store=row.store_id\n        col = resid.columns.get_loc(store)\n        if day-14 < 1 or day+14 > 365:\n            continue\n        future = float((neg.iloc[day:day+14, col].to_numpy() * weights).sum())\n        past = float((neg.iloc[day-14:day, col].to_numpy() * weights).sum())\n        results.append((prod,row.producer_id,store,day,row.qty,future-past,future,past))\nres=pd.DataFrame(results, columns=['product','producer','store','day','qty','score','future','past'])\nsummary=res.groupby(['product','producer']).agg(events=('score','size'),mean_score=('score','mean'),median_score=('score','median'),max_score=('score','max'),sum_score=('score','sum'),qty=('qty','sum')).reset_index()\n# print top by mean_score with at least 2 events and positive sum\nfor prod in sorted(summary['product'].unique())[:5]:\n    s=summary[(summary.product==prod)&(summary.events>=2)].sort_values(['mean_score','sum_score'], ascending=False).head(10)\n    print('\\\\n', prod)\n    print(s.to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_44","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport numpy as np\nimport pandas as pd\nfrom sklearn.linear_model import LassoCV\nfrom sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler\n\nsale_batches=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/sale_batches.pkl')\ndemand=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/demand.pkl')\nweights=np.array([0.8]*3 + [0.5]*4 + [0.2]*7)\nproducts=['P_15','P_7','P_1','P_10']\nfor prod in products:\n    ddf=demand[demand['product_id']==prod].copy()\n    stores=sorted(ddf['store_id'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\n    ddf['store_idx']=ddf['store_id'].map({s:i for i,s in enumerate(stores)})\n    pivot=ddf.pivot(index='day', columns='store_id', values='reported_demand').reindex(index=range(1,366), columns=stores)\n    y=np.log(pivot.values)\n    y_tilde=y - y.mean(axis=1, keepdims=True) - y.mean(axis=0, keepdims=True) + y.mean()\n    sb=sale_batches[sale_batches['product_id']==prod].groupby(['sale_day','store_id','producer_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum()\n    producers=sorted(sb['producer_id'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\n    X=[]\n    for pr in producers:\n        m=np.zeros((365, len(stores)))\n        sub=sb[sb['producer_id']==pr]\n        for row in sub.itertuples(index=False):\n            si=stores.index(row.store_id)\n            day=row.sale_day\n            # effect starts next day; add kernel to future days\n            for lag,w in enumerate(weights, start=1):\n                t=day+lag\n                if t<=365:\n                    m[t-1, si] += w * row.qty\n        X.append(m.reshape(-1))\n    X=np.column_stack(X)\n    yv=(-y_tilde).reshape(-1)\n    # remove features with zero variance\n    std=X.std(axis=0)\n    keep=std>1e-9\n    X=X[:,keep]\n    kept_producers=[p for p,k in zip(producers,keep) if k]\n    # two-way demean features too\n    # reshape each feature to 365x10, then demean\n    X2=[]\n    for j in range(X.shape[1]):\n        m=X[:,j].reshape(365,len(stores))\n        m=m - m.mean(axis=1, keepdims=True) - m.mean(axis=0, keepdims=True) + m.mean()\n        X2.append(m.reshape(-1))\n    X=np.column_stack(X2)\n    scaler=StandardScaler()\n    Xs=scaler.fit_transform(X)\n    model=LassoCV(cv=5, positive=True, n_jobs=None, max_iter=20000, random_state=0).fit(Xs, yv)\n    coef=model.coef_/scaler.scale_\n    out=pd.DataFrame({'producer':kept_producers,'coef':coef, 'abscoef':np.abs(coef)})\n    out=out[out['coef']>1e-6].sort_values('coef', ascending=False).head(10)\n    print('\\\\n',prod,'alpha',model.alpha_,'selected',len(out))\n    print(out.to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}
{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_44","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport numpy as np\nimport pandas as pd\nfrom sklearn.linear_model import LassoCV\nfrom sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler\n\nsale_batches=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/sale_batches.pkl')\ndemand=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/demand.pkl')\nweights=np.array([0.8]*3 + [0.5]*4 + [0.2]*7)\nproducts=['P_15','P_7','P_1','P_10']\nfor prod in products:\n    ddf=demand[demand['product_id']==prod].copy()\n    stores=sorted(ddf['store_id'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\n    ddf['store_idx']=ddf['store_id'].map({s:i for i,s in enumerate(stores)})\n    pivot=ddf.pivot(index='day', columns='store_id', values='reported_demand').reindex(index=range(1,366), columns=stores)\n    y=np.log(pivot.values)\n    y_tilde=y - y.mean(axis=1, keepdims=True) - y.mean(axis=0, keepdims=True) + y.mean()\n    sb=sale_batches[sale_batches['product_id']==prod].groupby(['sale_day','store_id','producer_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum()\n    producers=sorted(sb['producer_id'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\n    X=[]\n    for pr in producers:\n        m=np.zeros((365, len(stores)))\n        sub=sb[sb['producer_id']==pr]\n        for row in sub.itertuples(index=False):\n            si=stores.index(row.store_id)\n            day=row.sale_day\n            # effect starts next day; add kernel to future days\n            for lag,w in enumerate(weights, start=1):\n                t=day+lag\n                if t<=365:\n                    m[t-1, si] += w * row.qty\n        X.append(m.reshape(-1))\n    X=np.column_stack(X)\n    yv=(-y_tilde).reshape(-1)\n    # remove features with zero variance\n    std=X.std(axis=0)\n    keep=std>1e-9\n    X=X[:,keep]\n    kept_producers=[p for p,k in zip(producers,keep) if k]\n    # two-way demean features too\n    # reshape each feature to 365x10, then demean\n    X2=[]\n    for j in range(X.shape[1]):\n        m=X[:,j].reshape(365,len(stores))\n        m=m - m.mean(axis=1, keepdims=True) - m.mean(axis=0, keepdims=True) + m.mean()\n        X2.append(m.reshape(-1))\n    X=np.column_stack(X2)\n    scaler=StandardScaler()\n    Xs=scaler.fit_transform(X)\n    model=LassoCV(cv=5, positive=True, n_jobs=None, max_iter=20000, random_state=0).fit(Xs, yv)\n    coef=model.coef_/scaler.scale_\n    out=pd.DataFrame({'producer':kept_producers,'coef':coef, 'abscoef':np.abs(coef)})\n    out=out[out['coef']>1e-6].sort_values('coef', ascending=False).head(10)\n    print('\\\\n',prod,'alpha',model.alpha_,'selected',len(out))\n    print(out.to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"\n P_15 alpha 0.0008252904307929375 selected 8\nproducer     coef  abscoef\n   PR_52 0.002608 0.002608\n   PR_16 0.001845 0.001845\n   PR_14 0.000965 0.000965\n   PR_25 0.000841 0.000841\n   PR_32 0.000307 0.000307\n   PR_54 0.000247 0.000247\n    PR_5 0.000048 0.000048\n   PR_17 0.000001 0.000001\n\n P_7 alpha 0.0003347738352509747 selected 7\nproducer     coef  abscoef\n   PR_27 0.004248 0.004248\n   PR_50 0.002416 0.002416\n   PR_42 0.000771 0.000771\n   PR_45 0.000518 0.000518\n   PR_38 0.000222 0.000222\n   PR_16 0.000170 0.000170\n   PR_14 0.000085 0.000085\n\n P_1 alpha 0.00027111632753492205 selected 10\nproducer     coef  abscoef\n   PR_31 0.002467 0.002467\n   PR_38 0.002399 0.002399\n   PR_25 0.001299 0.001299\n   PR_37 0.000794 0.000794\n   PR_49 0.000776 0.000776\n    PR_4 0.000535 0.000535\n   PR_58 0.000334 0.000334\n   PR_24 0.000208 0.000208\n   PR_27 0.000064 0.000064\n   PR_46 0.000018 0.000018\n\n P_10 alpha 0.001030885052117962 selected 10\nproducer     coef  abscoef\n   PR_58 0.002558 0.002558\n   PR_25 0.002003 0.002003\n   PR_19 0.000775 0.000775\n   PR_45 0.000633 0.000633\n   PR_60 0.000587 0.000587\n   PR_26 0.000450 0.000450\n   PR_47 0.000394 0.000394\n   PR_23 0.000128 0.000128\n   PR_52 0.000066 0.000066\n   PR_14 0.000031 0.000031\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

logd.mean(axis=1).to_numpy()[:,None] - logd.mean(axis=0).to_numpy()[None,:] + logd.values.mean()\n        neg=(-resid).clip(lower=0)\n        prod_dom = dom[dom['product_id']==prod]\n        for row in prod_dom.itertuples(index=False):\n            day=row.sale_day\n            if day-14 < 1 or day+14 > 365:\n                continue\n            col = resid.columns.get_loc(row.store_id)\n            future = float((neg.iloc[day:day+14, col].to_numpy() * weights).sum())\n            past = float((neg.iloc[day-14:day, col].to_numpy() * weights).sum())\n            results.append((prod,row.producer_id,future-past,row.share))\n    res=pd.DataFrame(results, columns=['product','producer','score','share'])\n    summaries[thresh]=res.groupby(['product','producer']).agg(events=('score','size'),mean_score=('score','mean'),sum_score=('score','sum')).reset_index()\n\n# regression summary\nreg_rows=[]\nfor prod in sorted(demand['product_id'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1])):\n    ddf=demand[demand['product_id']==prod].copy()\n    stores=sorted(ddf['store_id'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\n    pivot=ddf.pivot(index='day', columns='store_id', values='reported_demand').reindex(index=range(1,366), columns=stores)\n    y=np.log(pivot.values)\n    y_tilde=y - y.mean(axis=1, keepdims=True) - y.mean(axis=0, keepdims=True) + y.mean()\n    sb=sale_batches[sale_batches['product_id']==prod].groupby(['sale_day','store_id','producer_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum()\n    producers=sorted(sb['producer_id'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\n    mats=[]\n    kept=[]\n    for pr in producers:\n        m=np.zeros((365, len(stores)))\n        sub=sb[sb['producer_id']==pr]\n        for row in sub.itertuples(index=False):\n            si=stores.index(row.store_id)\n            for lag,w in enumerate(weights, start=1):\n                t=row.sale_day+lag\n                if t<=365:\n                    m[t-1, si] += w * row.qty\n        m=m - m.mean(axis=1, keepdims=True) - m.mean(axis=0, keepdims=True) + m.mean()\n        v=m.reshape(-1)\n        if v.std()>1e-9:\n            mats.append(v)\n            kept.append(pr)\n    X=np.column_stack(mats)\n    yv=(-y_tilde).reshape(-1)\n    scaler=StandardScaler()\n    Xs=scaler.fit_transform(X)\n    model=LassoCV(cv=5, positive=True, max_iter=20000, random_state=0).fit(Xs, yv)\n    coef=model.coef_/scaler.scale_\n    for pr,c in zip(kept,coef):\n        reg_rows.append((prod,pr,c))\nreg=pd.DataFrame(reg_rows, columns=['product','producer','coef'])\n\n# print summary table\nfor prod in sorted(demand['product_id'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1])):\n    print(f'\\\\n{prod}')\n    s1=summaries[1.0]\n    s7=summaries[0.7]\n    top=set(s1[(s1['product']==prod)&(s1['mean_score']>0.05)]['producer']) | set(s7[(s7['product']==prod)&(s7['mean_score']>0.05)]['producer']) | set(reg[(reg['product']==prod)&(reg['coef']>0.001)]['producer'])\n    rows=[]\n    for pr in sorted(top, key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1])):\n        r1=s1[(s1['product']==prod)&(s1['producer']==pr)]\n        r7=s7[(s7['product']==prod)&(s7['producer']==pr)]\n        rr=reg[(reg['product']==prod)&(reg['producer']==pr)]\n        rows.append({\n            'producer':pr,\n            'sole_events': int(r1['events'].iloc[0]) if len(r1) else 0,\n            'sole_mean': float(r1['mean_score'].iloc[0]) if len(r1) else np.nan,\n            'dom_events': int(r7['events'].iloc[0]) if len(r7) else 0,\n            'dom_mean': float(r7['mean_score'].iloc[0]) if len(r7) else np.nan,\n            'coef': float(rr['coef'].iloc[0]) if len(rr) else np.nan,\n        })\n    df=pd.DataFrame(rows)\n    if len(df)==0:\n        print('  none')\n    else:\n        print(df.sort_values(['sole_mean','dom_mean','coef'], ascending=False).round(4).to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_49","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport numpy as np\nimport pandas as pd\nsale_batches=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/sale_batches.pkl')\ndemand=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/demand.pkl')\nweights=np.array([0.8]*3 + [0.5]*4 + [0.2]*7)\nagg=sale_batches.groupby(['sale_day','store_id','product_id','producer_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum()\ntot=agg.groupby(['sale_day','store_id','product_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum().rename(columns={'qty':'total'})\nmerged=agg.merge(tot,on=['sale_day','store_id','product_id'])\nmerged['share']=merged['qty']/merged['total']\nfor thresh in [1.0,0.7]:\n    dom=merged[merged['share']>=thresh].copy()\n    results=[]\n    for prod, ddf in demand.groupby('product_id'):\n        pivot=ddf.pivot(index='day', columns='store_id', values='reported_demand').reindex(index=range(1,366))\n        logd=np.log(pivot)\n        resid = logd - logd.mean(axis=1).to_numpy()[:,None] - logd.mean(axis=0).to_numpy()[None,:] + logd.values.mean()\n        neg=(-resid).clip(lower=0)\n        prod_dom = dom[dom['product_id']==prod]\n        for row in prod_dom.itertuples(index=False):\n            day=row.sale_day\n            if day-14 < 1 or day+14 > 365:\n                continue\n            col = resid.columns.get_loc(row.store_id)\n            future = float((neg.iloc[day:day+14, col].to_numpy() * weights).sum())\n            past = float((neg.iloc[day-14:day, col].to_numpy() * weights).sum())\n            results.append((prod,row.producer_id,future-past))\n    res=pd.DataFrame(results, columns=['product','producer','score'])\n    summary=res.groupby(['product','producer']).agg(events=('score','size'),mean=('score','mean'),std=('score','std')).reset_index()\n    summary['se']=summary['std']/np.sqrt(summary['events'])\n    summary['t']=summary['mean']/summary['se']\n    summary['t']=summary['t'].replace([np.inf,-np.inf],np.nan)\n    print('thresh',thresh)\n    print(summary[['events','mean','t']].describe(percentiles=[.9,.95,.99]).to_string())\n    print('count t>2 events>=3', ((summary['t']>2)&(summary['events']>=3)).sum())\n    print('count mean>.05 events>=3', ((summary['mean']>.05)&(summary['events']>=3)).sum())\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_55","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport numpy as np\nimport pandas as pd\nsale_batches=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/sale_batches.pkl')\ndemand=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/demand.pkl')\nagg=sale_batches.groupby(['sale_day','store_id','product_id','producer_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum()\ntot=agg.groupby(['sale_day','store_id','product_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum().rename(columns={'qty':'total'})\nmerged=agg.merge(tot,on=['sale_day','store_id','product_id'])\nmerged['share']=merged['qty']/merged['total']\nfor thresh in [1.0,0.7]:\n    dom=merged[merged['share']>=thresh].copy()\n    events=[]\n    for prod, ddf in demand.groupby('product_id'):\n        pivot=ddf.pivot(index='day', columns='store_id', values='reported_demand').reindex(index=range(1,366))\n        logd=np.log(pivot)\n        resid = logd - logd.mean(axis=1).to_numpy()[:,None] - logd.mean(axis=0).to_numpy()[None,:] + logd.values.mean()\n        neg=(-resid).clip(lower=0)\n        prod_dom=dom[dom['product_id']==prod]\n        for row in prod_dom.itertuples(index=False):\n            day=row.sale_day\n            if day-14 < 1 or day+14 > 365:\n                continue\n            col=resid.columns.get_loc(row.store_id)\n            seq=neg.iloc[day:day+14, col].to_numpy()  # days +1..+14\n            past=neg.iloc[day-14:day, col].to_numpy()\n            a=seq[:3].mean(); b=seq[3:7].mean(); c=seq[7:].mean()\n            score = 0.8*seq[:3].sum()+0.5*seq[3:7].sum()+0.2*seq[7:].sum() - (0.8*past[:3].sum()+0.5*past[3:7].sum()+0.2*past[7:].sum())\n            shape=(a>=b>=c) and (a>0.03) and (score>0.12)\n            events.append((prod,row.producer_id,row.store_id,day,row.share,row.qty,score,a,b,c,shape))\n    ev=pd.DataFrame(events, columns=['product','producer','store','day','share','qty','score','a','b','c','shape'])\n    sel=ev[ev['shape']]\n    summary=sel.groupby(['product','producer']).agg(events=('day','size'), max_score=('score','max'), mean_score=('score','mean')).reset_index()\n    print('\\\\nthreshold',thresh,'pairs',len(summary))\n    print(summary.sort_values(['product','events','max_score'], ascending=[True,False,False]).head(80).round(4).to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

b=seq[3:7].mean(); c=seq[7:].mean()\n            past_weight=0.8*past_seq[:3].sum()+0.5*past_seq[3:7].sum()+0.2*past_seq[7:].sum()\n            future_weight=0.8*seq[:3].sum()+0.5*seq[3:7].sum()+0.2*seq[7:].sum()\n            score=future_weight-past_weight\n            shape=(a>=b>=c) and (a>0.03) and (score>0.12) and (past_weight<0.12)\n            events.append((prod,row.producer_id,row.store_id,day,row.share,row.qty,score,a,b,c,past_weight,shape))\n    ev=pd.DataFrame(events, columns=['product','producer','store','day','share','qty','score','a','b','c','past','shape'])\n    sel=ev[ev['shape']]\n    summary=sel.groupby(['product','producer']).agg(events=('day','size'), max_score=('score','max'), mean_score=('score','mean')).reset_index()\n    print('\\\\nthreshold',thresh,'pairs',len(summary))\n    print(summary.sort_values(['product','events','max_score'], ascending=[True,False,False]).head(120).round(4).to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

logd.mean(axis=1).to_numpy()[:,None] - logd.mean(axis=0).to_numpy()[None,:] + logd.values.mean()\n        neg=(-resid).clip(lower=0)\n        prod_dom=dom[dom['product_id']==prod]\n        for row in prod_dom.itertuples(index=False):\n            day=row.sale_day\n            if day-3 < 1 or day+3 > 365:\n                continue\n            col=resid.columns.get_loc(row.store_id)\n            future=neg.iloc[day:day+3, col].mean()  # +1..+3\n            past=neg.iloc[day-3:day, col].mean()    # -3..-1\n            results.append((prod,row.producer_id,future-past,row.share))\n    res=pd.DataFrame(results, columns=['product','producer','score','share'])\n    summary=res.groupby(['product','producer']).agg(events=('score','size'),mean=('score','mean'),std=('score','std')).reset_index()\n    summary=summary[summary['events']>=3].copy()\n    summary['t']=summary['mean']/(summary['std']/np.sqrt(summary['events']))\n    sel=summary[(summary['mean']>0.02)&(summary['t']>2)]\n    print('\\\\nthreshold',thresh,'count',len(sel))\n    print(sel[['product','producer','events','mean','t']].sort_values(['product','mean'], ascending=[True,False]).round(4).to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

logd.mean(axis=1).to_numpy()[:,None] - logd.mean(axis=0).to_numpy()[None,:] + logd.values.mean()\n        neg=(-resid).clip(lower=0)\n        prod_dom=dom[dom['product_id']==prod]\n        for row in prod_dom.itertuples(index=False):\n            day=row.sale_day\n            if day-3 < 1 or day+3 > 365:\n                continue\n            col=resid.columns.get_loc(row.store_id)\n            future=neg.iloc[day:day+3, col].mean()  # +1..+3\n            past=neg.iloc[day-3:day, col].mean()    # -3..-1\n            results.append((prod,row.producer_id,future-past,row.share))\n    res=pd.DataFrame(results, columns=['product','producer','score','share'])\n    summary=res.groupby(['product','producer']).agg(events=('score','size'),mean=('score','mean'),std=('score','std')).reset_index()\n    summary=summary[summary['events']>=3].copy()\n    summary['t']=summary['mean']/(summary['std']/np.sqrt(summary['events']))\n    sel=summary[(summary['mean']>0.02)&(summary['t']>2)]\n    print('\\\\nthreshold',thresh,'count',len(sel))\n    print(sel[['product','producer','events','mean','t']].sort_values(['product','mean'], ascending=[True,False]).round(4).to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"\nthreshold 1.0 count 3\nproduct producer  events   mean      t\n   P_11    PR_50       3 0.0353 5.0805\n   P_12    PR_30       3 0.0301 3.7793\n   P_20    PR_34       8 0.0265 2.0210\n\nthreshold 0.8 count 3\nproduct producer  events   mean      t\n   P_12    PR_30       3 0.0301 3.7793\n   P_13     PR_3       7 0.0408 2.1481\n   P_20    PR_34       9 0.0260 2.2531\n\nthreshold 0.7 count 5\nproduct producer  events   mean      t\n   P_12    PR_30       3 0.0301 3.7793\n   P_13     PR_3       7 0.0408 2.1481\n   P_20    PR_34       9 0.0260 2.2531\n   P_29    PR_60      11 0.0586 2.2145\n    P_7    PR_50       4 0.0353 3.2086\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

b=seq[3:7].mean(); c=seq[7:].mean()\n        future_weight=0.8*seq[:3].sum()+0.5*seq[3:7].sum()+0.2*seq[7:].sum()\n        past_weight=0.8*past[:3].sum()+0.5*past[3:7].sum()+0.2*past[7:].sum()\n        score=future_weight-past_weight\n        shaped=(a>=b>=c) and (a>0.03) and (past_weight<0.12)\n        if shaped and score>0.25 and row.qty>=5:\n            rows.append((prod,row.producer_id,row.store_id,day,row.qty,score,a,b,c))\nres=pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=['product','producer','store','day','qty','score','a','b','c'])\nprint('count', len(res))\nprint(res.sort_values(['product','producer']).round(4).to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

b=seq[3:7].mean(); c=seq[7:].mean()\n        future_weight=0.8*seq[:3].sum()+0.5*seq[3:7].sum()+0.2*seq[7:].sum()\n        past_weight=0.8*past[:3].sum()+0.5*past[3:7].sum()+0.2*past[7:].sum()\n        score=future_weight-past_weight\n        shaped=(a>=b>=c) and (a>0.03) and (past_weight<0.12)\n        if shaped and score>0.25 and row.qty>=5:\n            rows.append((prod,row.producer_id,row.store_id,day,row.qty,score,a,b,c))\nres=pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=['product','producer','store','day','qty','score','a','b','c'])\nprint('count', len(res))\nprint(res.sort_values(['product','producer']).round(4).to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"count 7\nproduct producer store  day  qty  score      a      b      c\n   P_14    PR_17   S_2   43   15 0.3468 0.1134 0.0531 0.0292\n   P_15    PR_59  S_10  194    5 0.2754 0.0972 0.0556 0.0006\n   P_17    PR_49   S_8  149   18 0.2552 0.0768 0.0631 0.0188\n   P_25    PR_14   S_1   18   14 0.3178 0.1066 0.0424 0.0000\n   P_29    PR_25   S_6  348    7 0.2970 0.0697 0.0505 0.0378\n    P_5    PR_32  S_10  314   26 0.3482 0.0800 0.0650 0.0488\n    P_7    PR_34   S_9  156   14 0.3209 0.0702 0.0522 0.0411\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_62","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport numpy as np\nimport pandas as pd\nsale_batches=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/sale_batches.pkl')\ndemand=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/demand.pkl')\nagg=sale_batches.groupby(['sale_day','store_id','product_id','producer_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum()\ntot=agg.groupby(['sale_day','store_id','product_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum().rename(columns={'qty':'total'})\nmerged=agg.merge(tot,on=['sale_day','store_id','product_id'])\nmerged['share']=merged['qty']/merged['total']\n# prep residuals per product\nresid_neg={}\nfor prod, ddf in demand.groupby('product_id'):\n    pivot=ddf.pivot(index='day', columns='store_id', values='reported_demand').reindex(index=range(1,366))\n    logd=np.log(pivot)\n    resid = logd - logd.mean(axis=1).to_numpy()[:,None] - logd.mean(axis=0).to_numpy()[None,:] + logd.values.mean()\n    resid_neg[prod]=(-resid).clip(lower=0)\n\n# A: full-window sole significance\nweights=np.array([0.8]*3 + [0.5]*4 + [0.2]*7)\nsole=merged[merged['share']==1.0].copy()\nresults=[]\nfor row in sole.itertuples(index=False):\n    prod=row.product_id; day=row.sale_day\n    if day-14 < 1 or day+14 > 365:\n        continue\n    neg=resid_neg[prod]\n    col=neg.columns.get_loc(row.store_id)\n    future=float((neg.iloc[day:day+14, col].to_numpy()*weights).sum())\n    past=float((neg.iloc[day-14:day, col].to_numpy()*weights).sum())\n    results.append((prod,row.producer_id,future-past,row.qty,row.store_id,day))\nres=pd.DataFrame(results, columns=['product','producer','score','qty','store','day'])\nsummary=res.groupby(['product','producer']).agg(events=('score','size'),mean=('score','mean'),std=('score','std')).reset_index()\nsummary=summary[summary['events']>=3].copy()\nsummary['t']=summary['mean']/(summary['std']/np.sqrt(summary['events']))\nA=set(map(tuple, summary[(summary['mean']>0.05)&(summary['t']>2)][['product','producer']].to_records(index=False)))\n\n# B: early-window dominant significance share>=0.7\nresults=[]\ndom=merged[merged['share']>=0.7].copy()\nfor row in dom.itertuples(index=False):\n    prod=row.product_id; day=row.sale_day\n    if day-3 < 1 or day+3 > 365:\n        continue\n    neg=resid_neg[prod]\n    col=neg.columns.get_loc(row.store_id)\n    future=neg.iloc[day:day+3, col].mean()\n    past=neg.iloc[day-3:day, col].mean()\n    results.append((prod,row.producer_id,float(future-past)))\nres2=pd.DataFrame(results, columns=['product','producer','score'])\nsummary2=res2.groupby(['product','producer']).agg(events=('score','size'),mean=('score','mean'),std=('score','std')).reset_index()\nsummary2=summary2[summary2['events']>=3].copy()\nsummary2['t']=summary2['mean']/(summary2['std']/np.sqrt(summary2['events']))\nB=set(map(tuple, summary2[(summary2['mean']>0.02)&(summary2['t']>2)][['product','producer']].to_records(index=False)))\n\n# C: single clean strong sole event qty>=5\nrows=[]\nfor row in sole.itertuples(index=False):\n    prod=row.product_id; day=row.sale_day\n    if day-14 < 1 or day+14 > 365:\n        continue\n    neg=resid_neg[prod]\n    col=neg.columns.get_loc(row.store_id)\n    seq=neg.iloc[day:day+14, col].to_numpy(); past=neg.iloc[day-14:day, col].to_numpy()\n    a=seq[:3].mean(); b=seq[3:7].mean(); c=seq[7:].mean()\n    future_weight=0.8*seq[:3].sum()+0.5*seq[3:7].sum()+0.2*seq[7:].sum()\n    past_weight=0.8*past[:3].sum()+0.5*past[3:7].sum()+0.2*past[7:].sum()\n    score=future_weight-past_weight\n    shaped=(a>=b>=c) and (a>0.03) and (past_weight<0.12)\n    if shaped and score>0.25 and row.qty>=5:\n        rows.append((prod,row.producer_id))\nC=set(rows)\n\nunion=A|B|C\nprint('A',len(A),sorted(A)[:10])\nprint('B',len(B),sorted(B)[:10])\nprint('C',len(C),sorted(C)[:10])\nprint('union',len(union))\nfrom collections import defaultdict\nby_prod=defaultdict(list)\nfor prod,pr in union:\n    by_prod[prod].append(pr)\nfor prod in sorted(by_prod, key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1])):\n    print(prod, sorted(by_prod[prod], key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1])))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_63","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport numpy as np\nimport pandas as pd\nsale_batches=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/sale_batches.pkl')\ndemand=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/demand.pkl')\nweights=np.array([0.8]*3 + [0.5]*4 + [0.2]*7)\nagg=sale_batches.groupby(['sale_day','store_id','product_id','producer_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum()\ntot=agg.groupby(['sale_day','store_id','product_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum().rename(columns={'qty':'total'})\nmerged=agg.merge(tot,on=['sale_day','store_id','product_id'])\nmerged['share']=merged['qty']/merged['total']\ndom=merged[merged['share']>=0.7]\nresults=[]\nfor prod, ddf in demand.groupby('product_id'):\n    pivot=ddf.pivot(index='day', columns='store_id', values='reported_demand').reindex(index=range(1,366))\n    logd=np.log(pivot)\n    resid = logd - logd.mean(axis=1).to_numpy()[:,None] - logd.mean(axis=0).to_numpy()[None,:] + logd.values.mean()\n    neg=(-resid).clip(lower=0)\n    prod_dom=dom[dom['product_id']==prod]\n    for row in prod_dom.itertuples(index=False):\n        day=row.sale_day\n        if day-14 < 1 or day+14 > 365:\n            continue\n        col = neg.columns.get_loc(row.store_id)\n        future=float((neg.iloc[day:day+14, col].to_numpy()*weights).sum())\n        past=float((neg.iloc[day-14:day, col].to_numpy()*weights).sum())\n        results.append((prod,row.producer_id,future-past))\nres=pd.DataFrame(results, columns=['product','producer','score'])\nsummary=res.groupby(['product','producer']).agg(events=('score','size'),mean=('score','mean'),std=('score','std')).reset_index()\nsummary=summary[summary['events']>=3].copy(); summary['t']=summary['mean']/(summary['std']/np.sqrt(summary['events']))\nsel=summary[(summary['mean']>0.05)&(summary['t']>2)].sort_values(['product','mean'], ascending=[True,False])\nprint('count', len(sel))\nprint(sel[['product','producer','events','mean','t']].round(4).to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"count 25\nproduct producer  events   mean      t\n    P_1    PR_11       4 0.1201 2.8394\n   P_12    PR_48       7 0.0835 2.1020\n   P_12    PR_43       3 0.0765 3.0265\n   P_12     PR_5       7 0.0568 2.4896\n   P_15    PR_16       8 0.1737 3.1088\n   P_15     PR_5       3 0.0950 2.3016\n   P_15    PR_52       3 0.0809 2.1045\n   P_17    PR_34       6 0.0544 2.5210\n   P_19    PR_60       7 0.0530 2.1393\n    P_2    PR_41       5 0.1516 3.1420\n    P_2    PR_49       3 0.0776 3.0002\n   P_21    PR_41       3 0.2112 2.5686\n   P_23    PR_26       5 0.0993 3.4327\n   P_23    PR_41       3 0.0595 2.1292\n   P_24    PR_53       5 0.0787 2.2524\n   P_27    PR_45       3 0.2176 4.4739\n   P_28    PR_32       5 0.0534 2.5173\n    P_3    PR_50       3 0.0850 2.5380\n    P_3    PR_58       3 0.0816 2.1123\n   P_30    PR_17       7 0.0555 2.1248\n    P_5     PR_3       3 0.0519 2.9291\n    P_6    PR_34       5 0.1849 2.3831\n    P_7    PR_34       8 0.1248 2.0224\n    P_8    PR_28       3 0.0859 8.9497\n    P_8    PR_31       7 0.0847 2.8188\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_64","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport numpy as np\nimport pandas as pd\nsale_batches=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/sale_batches.pkl')\ndemand=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/demand.pkl')\nagg=sale_batches.groupby(['sale_day','store_id','product_id','producer_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum()\ntot=agg.groupby(['sale_day','store_id','product_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum().rename(columns={'qty':'total'})\nmerged=agg.merge(tot,on=['sale_day','store_id','product_id'])\nmerged['share']=merged['qty']/merged['total']\nresid_neg={}\nfor prod, ddf in demand.groupby('product_id'):\n    pivot=ddf.pivot(index='day', columns='store_id', values='reported_demand').reindex(index=range(1,366))\n    logd=np.log(pivot)\n    resid = logd - logd.mean(axis=1).to_numpy()[:,None] - logd.mean(axis=0).to_numpy()[None,:] + logd.values.mean()\n    resid_neg[prod]=(-resid).clip(lower=0)\nweights=np.array([0.8]*3 + [0.5]*4 + [0.2]*7)\n# dominant long-window significant\nresults=[]\ndom=merged[merged['share']>=0.7]\nfor row in dom.itertuples(index=False):\n    prod=row.product_id; day=row.sale_day\n    if day-14 < 1 or day+14 > 365:\n        continue\n    neg=resid_neg[prod]; col=neg.columns.get_loc(row.store_id)\n    future=float((neg.iloc[day:day+14, col].to_numpy()*weights).sum())\n    past=float((neg.iloc[day-14:day, col].to_numpy()*weights).sum())\n    results.append((prod,row.producer_id,future-past))\nres=pd.DataFrame(results, columns=['product','producer','score'])\nsummary=res.groupby(['product','producer']).agg(events=('score','size'),mean=('score','mean'),std=('score','std')).reset_index()\nsummary=summary[summary['events']>=3].copy(); summary['t']=summary['mean']/(summary['std']/np.sqrt(summary['events']))\nA=set(map(tuple, summary[(summary['mean']>0.05)&(summary['t']>2)][['product','producer']].to_records(index=False)))\n# early-window significant\nresults=[]\nfor row in dom.itertuples(index=False):\n    prod=row.product_id; day=row.sale_day\n    if day-3 < 1 or day+3 > 365:\n        continue\n    neg=resid_neg[prod]; col=neg.columns.get_loc(row.store_id)\n    future=neg.iloc[day:day+3, col].mean(); past=neg.iloc[day-3:day, col].mean()\n    results.append((prod,row.producer_id,float(future-past)))\nres2=pd.DataFrame(results, columns=['product','producer','score'])\nsummary2=res2.groupby(['product','producer']).agg(events=('score','size'),mean=('score','mean'),std=('score','std')).reset_index()\nsummary2=summary2[summary2['events']>=3].copy(); summary2['t']=summary2['mean']/(summary2['std']/np.sqrt(summary2['events']))\nB=set(map(tuple, summary2[(summary2['mean']>0.02)&(summary2['t']>2)][['product','producer']].to_records(index=False)))\n# strong clean sole event\nrows=[]\nsole=merged[merged['share']==1.0]\nfor row in sole.itertuples(index=False):\n    prod=row.product_id; day=row.sale_day\n    if day-14 < 1 or day+14 > 365:\n        continue\n    neg=resid_neg[prod]; col=neg.columns.get_loc(row.store_id)\n    seq=neg.iloc[day:day+14, col].to_numpy(); past=neg.iloc[day-14:day, col].to_numpy()\n    a=seq[:3].mean(); b=seq[3:7].mean(); c=seq[7:].mean()\n    future_weight=0.8*seq[:3].sum()+0.5*seq[3:7].sum()+0.2*seq[7:].sum()\n    past_weight=0.8*past[:3].sum()+0.5*past[3:7].sum()+0.2*past[7:].sum()\n    score=future_weight-past_weight\n    shaped=(a>=b>=c) and (a>0.03) and (past_weight<0.12)\n    if shaped and score>0.25 and row.qty>=5:\n        rows.append((prod,row.producer_id))\nC=set(rows)\nunion=A|B|C\nfrom collections import defaultdict\nby_prod=defaultdict(list)\nfor prod,pr in union:\n    by_prod[prod].append(pr)\nprint('count', len(union))\nfor prod in sorted(by_prod, key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1])):\n    print(prod, sorted(by_prod[prod], key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1])))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

b=seq[3:7].mean(); c=seq[7:].mean()\n    future_weight=0.8*seq[:3].sum()+0.5*seq[3:7].sum()+0.2*seq[7:].sum()\n    past_weight=0.8*past[:3].sum()+0.5*past[3:7].sum()+0.2*past[7:].sum()\n    score=future_weight-past_weight\n    shaped=(a>=b>=c) and (a>0.03) and (past_weight<0.12)\n    if shaped and score>0.25 and row.qty>=5:\n        rows.append((prod,row.producer_id))\nC=set(rows)\nunion=A|B|C\nfrom collections import defaultdict\nby_prod=defaultdict(list)\nfor prod,pr in union:\n    by_prod[prod].append(pr)\nprint('count', len(union))\nfor prod in sorted(by_prod, key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1])):\n    print(prod, sorted(by_prod[prod], key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1])))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"count 36\nP_1 ['PR_11']\nP_2 ['PR_41', 'PR_49']\nP_3 ['PR_50', 'PR_58']\nP_5 ['PR_3', 'PR_32']\nP_6 ['PR_34']\nP_7 ['PR_34', 'PR_50']\nP_8 ['PR_28', 'PR_31']\nP_12 ['PR_5', 'PR_30', 'PR_43', 'PR_48']\nP_13 ['PR_3']\nP_14 ['PR_17']\nP_15 ['PR_5', 'PR_16', 'PR_52', 'PR_59']\nP_17 ['PR_34', 'PR_49']\nP_19 ['PR_60']\nP_20 ['PR_34']\nP_21 ['PR_41']\nP_23 ['PR_26', 'PR_41']\nP_24 ['PR_53']\nP_25 ['PR_14']\nP_27 ['PR_45']\nP_28 ['PR_32']\nP_29 ['PR_25', 'PR_60']\nP_30 ['PR_17']\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_70","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\n# compute sole-only union: repeated significant + strong clean sole\nimport numpy as np, pandas as pd\nsale_batches=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/sale_batches.pkl')\ndemand=pd.read_pickle('/app/.cache_supply/demand.pkl')\nagg=sale_batches.groupby(['sale_day','store_id','product_id','producer_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum(); tot=agg.groupby(['sale_day','store_id','product_id'],as_index=False)['qty'].sum().rename(columns={'qty':'total'}); merged=agg.merge(tot,on=['sale_day','store_id','product_id']); merged['share']=merged['qty']/merged['total']\nsole=merged[merged.share==1.0]\nweights=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)\nresid_neg={}\nfor prod, ddf in demand.groupby('product_id'):\n    pivot=ddf.pivot(index='day', columns='store_id', values='reported_demand').reindex(index=range(1,366)); logd=np.log(pivot); resid=logd-logd.mean(axis=1).to_numpy()[:,None]-logd.mean(axis=0).to_numpy()[None,:]+logd.values.mean(); resid_neg[prod]=(-resid).clip(lower=0)\n# repeated significant\nresults=[]\nfor row in sole.itertuples(index=False):\n    if row.sale_day<15 or row.sale_day>351: continue\n    neg=resid_neg[row.product_id]; col=neg.columns.get_loc(row.store_id); seq=neg.iloc[row.sale_day:row.sale_day+14,col].to_numpy(); past=neg.iloc[row.sale_day-14:row.sale_day,col].to_numpy(); score=0.8*seq[:3].sum()+0.5*seq[3:7].sum()+0.2*seq[7:].sum()-(0.8*past[:3].sum()+0.5*past[3:7].sum()+0.2*past[7:].sum()); results.append((row.product_id,row.producer_id,score,row.qty,row.store_id,row.sale_day))\nres=pd.DataFrame(results, columns=['product','producer','score','qty','store','day'])\nsummary=res.groupby(['product','producer']).agg(events=('score','size'),mean=('score','mean'),std=('score','std')).reset_index(); summary=summary[summary.events>=3].copy(); summary['t']=summary['mean']/(summary['std']/np.sqrt(summary['events']))\nA=set(map(tuple, summary[(summary['mean']>0.05)&(summary['t']>2)][['product','producer']].to_records(index=False)))\n# strong clean sole\nC=set()\nfor row in sole.itertuples(index=False):\n    if row.sale_day<15 or row.sale_day>351: continue\n    neg=resid_neg[row.product_id]; col=neg.columns.get_loc(row.store_id); seq=neg.iloc[row.sale_day:row.sale_day+14,col].to_numpy(); past=neg.iloc[row.sale_day-14:row.sale_day,col].to_numpy(); a=seq[:3].mean(); b=seq[3:7].mean(); c=seq[7:].mean(); future_weight=0.8*seq[:3].sum()+0.5*seq[3:7].sum()+0.2*seq[7:].sum(); past_weight=0.8*past[:3].sum()+0.5*past[3:7].sum()+0.2*past[7:].sum(); score=future_weight-past_weight; shaped=(a>=b>=c) and (a>0.03) and (past_weight<0.12); \n    if shaped and score>0.25 and row.qty>=5:\n        C.add((row.product_id,row.producer_id))\nunion=A|C\nprint('A',len(A),'C',len(C),'union',len(union))\nfrom collections import defaultdict\nby=defaultdict(list)\nfor prod,pr in union: by[prod].append(pr)\nfor prod in sorted(by, key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1])):\n    print(prod, sorted(by[prod], key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1])))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}
